items.title: Aiper’s Memorial Day Sale drops newest Scuba V3 AI Vision cordless robot pool cleaner to $900 low, more
items.summary:

Only on the market since late February, this new robot fetches $1,100 at full price directly from Aiper, while Amazon has seen it climb as high as $1,400. We’ve mostly seen discounts take the costs down between $1,000 and $950, though there have been some occasional falls to the $900 low previously, with that price coming back around during this sale event for $200 savings ($500 off Amazon’s full price tag) at the best rate we have tracked. You can shop the brand’s entire Memorial Day Sale lineup on the landing page here, with some deals also available in the official Amazon storefront here.
